headline: Agent tooling and model regulation dominated the month as GPT-5.6 reviews and a federal recall of Anthropic models surfaced together.
body: Agent infrastructure led the rotation, with Agent Development Kit, file handling, and Claude all moving at the top alongside workflow automation tooling like Google Antigravity and production-grade agent harnesses [1][3][10]. Regulation broke into the foreground: GPT-5.6 and Fable were reported banned, and a panel discussed a federal recall of Anthropic's Fable and Mythos models [2][7]. GPT-5.6 Sol, Terra, and Luna drew mixed benchmark results and concern over cyber capabilities despite OpenAI's safety claims [0]. On the technique side, optimal transport broke out and new entrants including posterior collapse, parameterization, initialization, spatial-semantic prompting, prompt fusion, latent dynamics learning, and model cascading appeared.
